TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_family_Paicu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: teku poisua sua er tanasa er cani pininga.
S.PHON: teku poisua sua er~ɾ tanasa er~ɾ ʦani piniŋa.
S.FORM: teku poisua sua er tanasa er cani pininga.
S.PHON: teku poisua sua er~ɾ tanasa er~ɾ ʦani piniŋa.
S.TRANSL: 我要講關於我的家庭.

TRANSL.notes: I want to talk about (my) family.

S.TRANSL: I want to talk about family.

S.FORM: er miana iikim 'esipa coomaku cinaamaku er kinvavaia 'esipa kangvang.
S.PHON: er~ɾ miana iikim ʔesipa ʦoomaku ʦinaamaku er~ɾ kinvavaia ʔesipa kaŋvaŋ.
S.FORM: er miana iikim 'esipa coomaku cinaamaku er kinvavaia 'esipa kangvang.
S.PHON: er~ɾ miana iikim ʔesipa ʦoomaku ʦinaamaku er~ɾ kinvavaia ʔesipa kaŋvaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 以前,我爸爸還在,我媽媽,我兄弟姊妹,全部都還在.
In the past, my father was still alive, my mother and my siblings were all alive.

S.FORM: makasuacukim.
S.PHON: makasuaʦukim.
S.FORM: makasuacukim.
S.PHON: makasuaʦukim.
S.TRANSL: 以前,我爸爸還在,我媽媽,我兄弟姊妹,全部都還在.我們就那樣了.
In the past, my father was still alive, my mother and my siblings were all alive. We were so.

S.FORM: er 'unaku vai nanakʉ kanarua iiku iiku marang kanakana'ua makasuacukim.
S.PHON: er~ɾ ʔunaku vai nanakɨ kanar~ɾua iiku iiku mar~ɾaŋ kanakanaʔua makasuaʦukim.
S.FORM: er 'unaku vai nanakʉ kanarua iiku iiku marang kanakana'ua makasuacukim.
S.PHON: er~ɾ ʔunaku vai nanakɨ kanar~ɾua iiku iiku mar~ɾaŋ kanakanaʔua makasuaʦukim.

TRANSL.notes: 我有一個姊妹,(更正確地說)是妹妹.我是兄弟姊妹當中年紀最大的.我們就那樣了.

S.TRANSL: 我有一個姊妹, 是妹妹.我是兄弟姊妹當中年紀最大的.我們就那樣了.

TRANSL.notes: I have a female sibling, (more precisely) a younger sister, I am the oldest among my siblings. We are so.

S.TRANSL: I have a female sibling, a younger sister, I am the oldest among my siblings. We are so.

S.FORM: arataatiaa mosacu na marisinatU marisinatʉʉ.
S.PHON: ar~ɾataatiaa mosaʦu na mar~ɾisinatu mar~ɾisinatɨɨ.
S.FORM: arataatiaa mosacu na marisinatU marisinatʉʉ.
S.PHON: ar~ɾataatiaa mosaʦu na mar~ɾisinatu mar~ɾisinatɨɨ.
S.TRANSL: 長大後,就去上學了,一直讀書.
Growing up, I went to attend school and kept learning.

S.FORM: matirupaang marisinatU po po'icikia 'aan 'aancikia marisinatU er makasuacu.
S.PHON: matir~ɾupaaŋ mar~ɾisinatu po poʔiʦikia ʔaan ʔaanʦikia mar~ɾisinatu er~ɾ makasuaʦu.
S.FORM: matirupaang marisinatU po po'icikia 'aan 'aancikia marisinatU er makasuacu.
S.PHON: matir~ɾupaaŋ mar~ɾisinatu po poʔiʦikia ʔaan ʔaanʦikia mar~ɾisinatu er~ɾ makasuaʦu.

TRANSL.notes: 完成學業我就回來,我就不(繼續)讀書了.就這樣.

S.TRANSL: 完成學業我就回來,我就不 讀書了.就這樣.

TRANSL.notes: Finishing studying, I went back to home, I didn't (continue to) study. That was so.

S.TRANSL: Finishing studying, I went back to home, I didn't study. That was so.

S.FORM: ta'u tavarU'Uncikia umara cau 'una Uncoo er er mamarang makasi tia kan poru poru'ucaangUn misee poru'ucaangUn muru'ucaang ai er.
S.PHON: taʔu tavar~ɾuʔunʦikia umar~ɾa ʦau ʔuna unʦoo er~ɾ er~ɾ mamar~ɾaŋ makasi tia kan por~ɾu por~ɾuʔuʦaaŋun misee por~ɾuʔuʦaaŋun mur~ɾuʔuʦaaŋ ai er~ɾ.
S.FORM: ta'u tavarU'Uncikia umara cau 'una Uncoo er er mamarang makasi tia kan poru poru'ucaangUn misee poru'ucaangUn muru'ucaang ai er.
S.PHON: taʔu tavar~ɾuʔunʦikia umar~ɾa ʦau ʔuna unʦoo er~ɾ er~ɾ mamar~ɾaŋ makasi tia kan por~ɾu por~ɾuʔuʦaaŋun misee por~ɾuʔuʦaaŋun mur~ɾuʔuʦaaŋ ai er~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 我父母說要讓我結婚.

TRANSL.notes: My parents said (that they) wanted to make me get married.

S.TRANSL: My parents said wanted to make me get married.

S.FORM: er muru'ucaang erkim Mu Mu'u nganaiin Mu'u Mu'u PaicU sua nganaimia makasuacukim miana.
S.PHON: er~ɾ mur~ɾuʔuʦaaŋ er~ɾkim mu muʔu ŋanaiin muʔu muʔu paiʦu sua ŋanaimia makasuaʦukim miana.
S.FORM: er muru'ucaang erkim Mu Mu'u nganaiin Mu'u Mu'u PaicU sua nganaimia makasuacukim miana.
S.PHON: er~ɾ mur~ɾuʔuʦaaŋ er~ɾkim mu muʔu ŋanaiin muʔu muʔu paiʦu sua ŋanaimia makasuaʦukim miana.
S.TRANSL: Mu'u是他的名字,Mu'u和PaicU是我們的名字.我們以前就是那樣了.
Mu'u is his name, and Mu'u and PaicU are our names. We were so in the past.

S.FORM: er mamarurang marangcu mamarangmaku 'aancu tavarU'U putukikio mau'urapikim mau'urapikim.
S.PHON: er~ɾ mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ mar~ɾaŋʦu mamar~ɾaŋmaku ʔaanʦu tavar~ɾuʔu putukikio mauʔur~ɾapikim mauʔur~ɾapikim.
S.FORM: er mamarurang marangcu mamarangmaku 'aancu tavarU'U putukikio mau'urapikim mau'urapikim.
S.PHON: er~ɾ mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ mar~ɾaŋʦu mamar~ɾaŋmaku ʔaanʦu tavar~ɾuʔu putukikio mauʔur~ɾapikim mauʔur~ɾapikim.

TRANSL.notes: 父母年長了,我的父母年長了不能工作了,(但)我們(兄弟姊妹們)年紀還很小.

S.TRANSL: 父母年長了,我的父母年長了不能工作了, 我們 年紀還很小.

TRANSL.notes: (Our) parents got aged, (our) parents got aged (so that they) could not work, (but) we (siblings) were still very young.

S.TRANSL: parents got aged, parents got aged could not work, we were still very young.

S.FORM: 'akia kUna 'una ai mUmUkU mUmUkU mamarang miana tanUkU tammi 'una vina'U kUna kUna miana.
S.PHON: ʔakia kuna ʔuna ai mumuku mumuku mamar~ɾaŋ miana tanuku tammi ʔuna vinaʔu kuna kuna miana.
S.FORM: 'akia kUna 'una ai mUmUkU mUmUkU mamarang miana tanUkU tammi 'una vina'U kUna kUna miana.
S.PHON: ʔakia kuna ʔuna ai mumuku mumuku mamar~ɾaŋ miana tanuku tammi ʔuna vinaʔu kuna kuna miana.

TRANSL.notes: 沒有食物,長輩們以前有種芋頭、地瓜和小米.(這些是)以前的食物.

S.TRANSL: 沒有食物,長輩們以前有種芋頭、地瓜和小米. 以前的食物.

TRANSL.notes: There was no food, (and our) parents grew taroes, sweet potatoes, millets in the past. (They were) the food in the past.

S.TRANSL: There was no food, parents grew taroes, sweet potatoes, millets in the past. the food in the past.

S.FORM: makasuacikia.
S.PHON: makasuaʦikia.
S.FORM: makasuacikia.
S.PHON: makasuaʦikia.

TRANSL.notes: 沒有食物,長輩們以前有種芋頭、地瓜和小米.(這些是)以前的食物.我們就那樣了.

S.TRANSL: 沒有食物,長輩們以前有種芋頭、地瓜和小米. 以前的食物.我們就那樣了.

TRANSL.notes: There was no food, (and our) parents grew taroes, sweet potatoes, millets in the past. (They were) the food in the past. We were so.

S.TRANSL: There was no food, parents grew taroes, sweet potatoes, millets in the past. the food in the past. We were so.

S.FORM: masiin marang marangcikia masiin marurangcikia masiin 'akia er vaantuku 'aancikia tavarU'U kavanvaantuku marangcu miaranasUkia mamia sii 'akia manu saronai.
S.PHON: masiin mar~ɾaŋ mar~ɾaŋʦikia masiin mar~ɾur~ɾaŋʦikia masiin ʔakia er~ɾ vaantuku ʔaanʦikia tavar~ɾuʔu kavanvaantuku mar~ɾaŋʦu miar~ɾanasukia mamia sii ʔakia manu sar~ɾonai.
S.FORM: masiin marang marangcikia masiin marurangcikia masiin 'akia er vaantuku 'aancikia tavarU'U kavanvaantuku marangcu miaranasUkia mamia sii 'akia manu saronai.
S.PHON: masiin mar~ɾaŋ mar~ɾaŋʦikia masiin mar~ɾur~ɾaŋʦikia masiin ʔakia er~ɾ vaantuku ʔaanʦikia tavar~ɾuʔu kavanvaantuku mar~ɾaŋʦu miar~ɾanasukia mamia sii ʔakia manu sar~ɾonai.

TRANSL.notes: 沒有錢,沒辦法賺錢,(因為)我年紀大了,我只有困苦著,因為(我父母)沒有男孩子.

S.TRANSL: 沒有錢,沒辦法賺錢, 我年紀大了,我只有困苦著,因為 沒有男孩子.

TRANSL.notes: There was no money, I couldn't make money (because) I got aged. I could only be tough, because (my parents) didn't have any boy.

S.TRANSL: There was no money, I couldn't make money I got aged. I could only be tough, because didn't have any boy.

S.FORM: ucaan mamia na kanakana'uamaku acecu 'akiacu mamane.
S.PHON: uʦaan mamia na kanakanaʔuamaku aʦeʦu ʔakiaʦu mamane.
S.FORM: ucaan mamia na kanakana'uamaku acecu 'akiacu mamane.
S.PHON: uʦaan mamia na kanakanaʔuamaku aʦeʦu ʔakiaʦu mamane.
S.TRANSL: 我只有一位哥哥,已經走了,不在人世間了.

TRANSL.notes: I only had one late older brother, (who already) left and was't in the world.

S.TRANSL: I only had one late older brother, left and was't in the world.

S.FORM: er cikim er cani pininga.
S.PHON: er~ɾ ʦikim er~ɾ ʦani piniŋa.
S.FORM: er cikim er cani pininga.
S.PHON: er~ɾ ʦikim er~ɾ ʦani piniŋa.
S.TRANSL: 我們一家人……了.
We the whole family....

S.FORM: er umaraciku a umaracikim rU'UvU rU'UvU kana'uamaku ucang kana'uamaku.
S.PHON: er~ɾ umar~ɾaʦiku a umar~ɾaʦikim r~ɾuʔuvu r~ɾuʔuvu kanaʔuamaku uʦaŋ kanaʔuamaku.
S.FORM: er umaraciku a umaracikim rU'UvU rU'UvU kana'uamaku ucang kana'uamaku.
S.PHON: er~ɾ umar~ɾaʦiku a umar~ɾaʦikim r~ɾuʔuvu r~ɾuʔuvu kanaʔuamaku uʦaŋ kanaʔuamaku.
S.TRANSL: 如果那樣的話,心裡就比較舒坦一點了.
If the condition was like so, my heart would be relieved.

S.FORM: ka'anvuana ka'anvuana sua 'Uncoo niaramia.
S.PHON: kaʔanvuana kaʔanvuana sua ʔunʦoo niar~ɾamia.
S.FORM: ka'anvuana ka'anvuana sua 'Uncoo niaramia.
S.PHON: kaʔanvuana kaʔanvuana sua ʔunʦoo niar~ɾamia.

TRANSL.notes: 我們(家)娶了我哥哥的伴侶,我哥哥的配偶,我們所娶的是住瑪雅里的.

S.TRANSL: 我們 娶了我哥哥的伴侶,我哥哥的配偶,我們所娶的是住瑪雅里的.

TRANSL.notes: We (our family) took my older brother's partner, my older brother's spouse, the person we took lived in NU'Uvana.

S.TRANSL: We took my older brother's partner, my older brother's spouse, the person we took lived in NU'Uvana.

S.FORM: naannakU cikim arakukun mamanUUng.
S.PHON: naannaku ʦikim ar~ɾakukun mamanuuŋ.
S.FORM: naannakU cikim arakukun mamanUUng.
S.PHON: naannaku ʦikim ar~ɾakukun mamanuuŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 我們……跟那個女人(哥哥的老婆)很好的相處.

S.TRANSL: 我們……跟那個女人 很好的相處.

TRANSL.notes: We ...got along with the woman (my older brother's spouse).

S.TRANSL: We ...got along with the woman .

S.FORM: er noo no'onaniin mararuaicikim.
S.PHON: er~ɾ noo noʔonaniin mar~ɾar~ɾuaiʦikim.
S.FORM: er noo no'onaniin mararuaicikim.
S.PHON: er~ɾ noo noʔonaniin mar~ɾar~ɾuaiʦikim.
S.TRANSL: 之後我們就分開了.
Well, afterwards, we were separated from each other.

S.FORM: mu mucaancu nguani katatanasa karananakim.
S.PHON: mu muʦaanʦu ŋuani katatanasa kar~ɾananakim.
S.FORM: mu mucaancu nguani katatanasa karananakim.
S.PHON: mu muʦaanʦu ŋuani katatanasa kar~ɾananakim.
S.TRANSL: 他們就離開蓋房子,跟我們不同.

TRANSL.notes: They left to build (their) house, and were different from us.

S.TRANSL: They left to build house, and were different from us.

S.FORM: er makasiacukim miaranasU sii 'akia nononoman serupaca.
S.PHON: er~ɾ makasiaʦukim miar~ɾanasu sii ʔakia nononoman ser~ɾupaʦa.
S.FORM: er makasiacukim miaranasU sii 'akia nononoman serupaca.
S.PHON: er~ɾ makasiaʦukim miar~ɾanasu sii ʔakia nononoman ser~ɾupaʦa.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣子,我們很困苦,因為沒有可以使用的各種工具.
We were tough in this way, because we didn't have the tools that we could use.

S.FORM: mataa er cinaamaku na cinaamaku marang kangvang na coomaku marangcu kangvang er 'akia 'akiacu masiin er 'akia 'akiacu mamane masiin.
S.PHON: mataa er~ɾ ʦinaamaku na ʦinaamaku mar~ɾaŋ kaŋvaŋ na ʦoomaku mar~ɾaŋʦu kaŋvaŋ er~ɾ ʔakia ʔakiaʦu masiin er~ɾ ʔakia ʔakiaʦu mamane masiin.
S.FORM: mataa er cinaamaku na cinaamaku marang kangvang na coomaku marangcu kangvang er 'akia 'akiacu masiin er 'akia 'akiacu mamane masiin.
S.PHON: mataa er~ɾ ʦinaamaku na ʦinaamaku mar~ɾaŋ kaŋvaŋ na ʦoomaku mar~ɾaŋʦu kaŋvaŋ er~ɾ ʔakia ʔakiaʦu masiin er~ɾ ʔakia ʔakiaʦu mamane masiin.
S.TRANSL: 原本的媽媽也年老了,原本的爸爸也年老了,現在沒有了,不在人間了.

TRANSL.notes: (My) late mother also got old, (my) late father also got old; they don't exist now, they aren't in the world now.

S.TRANSL: late mother also got old, late father also got old; they don't exist now, they aren't in the world now.
